qa_pair.question: A patient in a subsequent CoCM month has accrued 137 care-manager minutes and has an initiating visit on file. How many 99494 add-on units does this month support?
Under the medicare-wi payer model, what is the estimated payment in USD for an initial CoCM month where the patient accrued exactly 36 minutes with an initiating visit on file?
What is the total modeled payment in USD at medicare-natl rates for a claim consisting of one 99492 and three units of 99494?

A subsequent-month CoCM patient accrued exactly 30 minutes with an initiating visit on file. What is the estimated wi-medicaid rate in USD for the code this month qualifies for (no ForwardHealth override loaded)?
What is the portal-verified Wisconsin Medicaid rate in USD for the BHIC medical home comprehensive care coordination and planning initial plan code?
How many entries are in the Initiating category of the billing code catalogue?
An initial-month CoCM patient has accrued 85 minutes with an initiating visit on file. At what minute count does their next 99494 add-on unit unlock?

Evaluate this panel at medicare-natl rates, all with initiating visits on file: PT-A cocm initial 70 minutes, PT-B cocm subsequent 29 minutes, PT-C bhi 20 minutes. How many patients are billable this month?
In USD, how much higher is the medicare-natl rate for 99492 than for 99493?
According to the code catalogue, which APCM companion add-on code mirrors 99493 for subsequent CoCM months?
